completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 4 parts (web, api, worker, infra)
Inventoried existing docs in docs/ and _bmad-output/
Tech stack per part documented (React 19/Vite 6 web; FastAPI/SQLModel api; arq/trimesh worker; Compose/nginx infra)
Conditional analysis skipped (quick scan, no source-file reading); pattern-matched module names instead
Source tree annotated; critical files cross-referenced to concerns
Dev/deploy ritual inherited from docs/operations.md (no new docs generated)
Integration architecture inherited from docs/architecture.md (no new doc generated)
Per-part architecture intentionally skipped — docs/architecture.md remains authoritative (avoid duplication)
Validation skipped (no incomplete markers used — intentional minimal-set generation)

findings.scope_notes: Intentionally minimal generation: only index.md + project-overview.md + source-tree-analysis.md. Per-part architecture and api-contracts/data-models docs skipped because docs/architecture.md + migrations/versions/ + project-context.md already exhaustively cover those concerns. Purpose: feed bmad-product-brief with a fact-base for Initiative 0 / Product Foundation backfill, not produce a full standalone doc suite.

resume_instructions: Workflow completed. To regenerate: run bmad-document-project, select 'Re-scan entire project', pick scan_level=deep for full architecture-per-part + api-contracts coverage.
